name: Uber
overview: Uber is a technology company that connects riders with drivers through its platform. Known for solving complex real-time geospatial problems at scale.
hiringProcess: Uber's process includes a recruiter call, coding phone screen, and 4 onsite rounds covering coding, system design, and behavioral questions.
eligibility: Strong algorithmic skills, experience with distributed systems preferred.
preparationTips: Focus on graph algorithms, real-time systems, and geospatial problems. Study Uber's engineering blog.
